name_en: 🆕【 M83678 Printed 】This card holder features a classic Monogram pattern embossed in Monogram Empreinte leather, accented with Parisian logo embossing. The elegant design features a large central compartment and an outer compartment. 7.5 x 0.4 x 11 cm (H x W x L)
